name: acta-frontend
description: Acta frontend bundle — only used to compile the description editor (TipTap). Most of the app stays on CDN (HTMX, Alpine, Tailwind via Play CDN). See docs/decisions/0014-frontend-architecture.md for the rationale.

scripts.build:js: esbuild static_src/js/description_editor.js --bundle --format=iife --minify --target=es2020 --outfile=static/js/description_editor.bundle.js --log-level=info && esbuild static_src/js/reactions.js --bundle --format=iife --minify --target=es2020 --outfile=static/js/reactions.bundle.js --log-level=info && npm run build:js:acta
scripts.build:css: tailwindcss -i static_src/css/main.css -o static/css/main.bundle.css --minify && tailwindcss -c tailwind.prose.config.js -i static_src/css/prose.css -o static/css/prose.bundle.css --minify
